note: Metadata reconstructed post-run (finalize OOM on 7.2GB file - now fixed) | BCBS NC (11512) enrichment added 2026-04-19: 2770 records from myprime.com PDFs. | BCBS RI (15287) re-parsed 2026-04-22 via VPN: 2950 records in formulary_sbm_ri_bcbsri.json (was 3046 from prior parse, new file has PA/QL/ST/SP flags per drug). | NHPRI RI (77514) parsed 2026-04-22 via VPN: 4092 records in formulary_sbm_ri_nhpri.json (CVS Caremark PDF, 6-tier, effective 04/01/2026, single-column layout).
note2: UPMC Health Plan PA (16322/93688) added 2026-04-22: 1954 records via EasyOCR on Advantage Choice 2026 PDF (Widen CDN). 685 net-new added to formulary_sbm_PA.json (28,040 -> 28,725).
note3: Audit 2026-04-22: unique_issuer_ids_with_data corrected 114->199 and total_drug_records corrected 20,497,198->14,854,187 via streaming scan of full 4.44GB file. Original meta was reconstructed post-OOM and did not account for batch 1 (32 issuers, 12.7M records), FN issuers (6, 25.9K), batch 2 (6 carriers, 1.65M), Dean WI (38345, 119.8K), Medica MO (47840, 98.3K).
